title: Replace Canva with this NEW AI Tool
summary: Jack Roberts demonstrates using Claude with a specialized prompt to generate Instagram carousel designs in under 10 minutes, claiming output quality matches or exceeds Canva's. The author argues this approach makes dedicated design tools unnecessary for content creation.
writeup: Jack Roberts walks through using Claude with a specialized prompt to produce Instagram carousel designs in under 10 minutes. The demonstration argues the output quality matches or exceeds Canva's, positioning a prompt-driven workflow as a substitute for dedicated design tools in content creation. The central takeaway: a single tailored prompt can replace a separate design app for generating carousels.
